pi_items.source: setup_task.sh configuration setting VIDEO_FILE and prepare_video_data.py
task.json description and verifier.py keyword logic
prepare_video_data.py dataset download URL and directory extraction

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world surveillance data from the UCSD Anomaly Dataset (UCSDped2). The video file ucsd_pedestrian.mp4 is streamed to a camera correctly configured as Walkway Camera via setup scripts. The task requires creating a bookmark named Zone Violation to flag anomalies and saving a detailed log to /home/ga/violation_report.txt, both of which match the explicit prompt instructions and the export script hardcoded paths.
